'''Lhira''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], she was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] loyal to [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]. She helped [[Karn]] in running Iblis' six Rebel cells on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Stoga]]. She and Karn tried to apprehend [[Rasha Bex]] when [[BoShek/Legends|BoShek]] helped her return to her [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] overseers, but failed.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 23|''Empire'' 23]] {{1st}}
